title: Occupational Therapy Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Occupational Therapy Master Program Mission and Vision

VISION

To be an innovative and pioneering education unit that carries out original scientific studies in its field, is recognized in national and international platforms with its education, practice and research and is recognized and preferred at the level of compotence in helath science education and training in the World.

MISSION

Occupational Therapy Master’s program is an academically strong program that exhibits a holistic and effective approach in a scientific sense, is interdisciplinary, respectful to universal, cultural, ethical and human values, researching, creative, innovative, using science and technology to increase the health, development and quality of life of the society. To train people who are equipped and have academic discipline in this field by creating a training program.
